suggest.ext-amqp: Required when using the amqp handler with the ext-amqp exchange
suggest.ext-curl: Required when using curl-based handlers such as ifttt, loggly, send_grid, slack_webhook, or telegram_bot
suggest.ext-json: Required when using JSON-based Monolog formatters
suggest.ext-mongodb: Required when using the mongo_db handler with MongoDB\Driver\Manager
suggest.ext-openssl: Required when using SSL socket handlers such as fleep_hook, flowdock, or slack
suggest.ext-sockets: Required when using the syslog_udp handler
suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Required when using the dynamo_db or sqs handlers
suggest.doctrine/couchdb: Required when using the doctrine_couch_db handler
suggest.elastic/elasticsearch: Required when using the elasticsearch handler with the official Elasticsearch client v8
suggest.elasticsearch/elasticsearch: Required when using the elasticsearch handler with the official Elasticsearch client v7
suggest.graylog2/gelf-php: Required when using the gelf handler or formatter
suggest.mongodb/mongodb: Required when using the mongo_db handler or formatter
suggest.php-amqplib/php-amqplib: Required when using the amqp handler with php-amqplib
suggest.php-console/php-console: Required when using the php_console handler
suggest.predis/predis: Required when using redis handlers with Predis
suggest.rollbar/rollbar: Required when using the rollbar handler
suggest.ruflin/elastica: Required when using the elastica handler or formatter
suggest.sirix/redaction: Required when using the redactor processor
suggest.swiftmailer/swiftmailer: Required when using the mandrill handler
suggest.symfony/mailer: Required when using the symfony_mailer handler
suggest.symfony/mime: Required when using the symfony_mailer handler
